content: By 2025, self-supervised world model memory agents can repurpose the state-of-the-art curiosity-driven active learning selection mechanisms from 2024–2025 agent memory SOTA to prioritize which newly simulated world state trajectories get stored in long-term episodic memory, rather than wasting capacity on redundant or low-information hypothetical futures. This creates a "curiosity filter" that cuts memory bloat while improving the agent’s long-horizon planning accuracy.
